reviews.comment:
Destacable la atención y cordialidad de quien estaba a cargó del turno de la estación.
En el bar, no se pierdan llevar un Sándwich de Crudo y Queso, o Matambre.
Sombra entre árboles para almorzar al mediodía, remanzo de paz.
Parada cuasi obligatoria.
Muy recomendable.
Excelentes baños para ambos sexos.

(Translated by Google)
The attentiveness and friendliness of the station's shift manager were noteworthy.
At the bar, don't miss a raw and cheese sandwich or a matambre.
Shade among the trees for lunch at midday, a haven of peace.
An almost obligatory stop.
Highly recommended.
Excellent restrooms for both sexes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwS01IUmZPVkI2VVZvMGVVbHdNaTFPUjJZeWVWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente,es un imprescindible, tenés q bajar y probarlos.
Exquisitos sándwichs..de muy buena calidad. Abundantes

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, it's a must-try. You have to go down and try them.
